ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "subregion" TEXT /* Subregion to which the country belongs */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent to which the country belongs */,
  "population_2020" INTEGER /* Population in 2020 */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) in millions of USD */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate as a percentage */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate as a percentage */,
  "trade_balance" REAL /* Trade balance in millions of USD */,
  "foreign_direct_investment" REAL /* Foreign direct investment (FDI) in millions of USD */,
  "public_debt" REAL /* Public debt as a percentage of GDP */,
  "government_spending" REAL /* Government spending as a percentage of GDP */,
  "consumer_price_index" REAL /* Consumer Price Index (CPI) */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient (measure of income inequality) */,
  "poverty_headcount_ratio" REAL /* Poverty headcount ratio as a percentage */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Urban population */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Rural population */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate as a percentage */,
  "internet_usage" REAL /* Internet usage as a percentage of the population */,
  "mobile_subscriptions" REAL /* Mobile subscriptions per 100 people */,
  "tourist_arrivals" INTEGER /* Number of tourist arrivals */,
  "tourist_receipts" REAL /* Tourist receipts in millions of USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL or reference to the data source */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the data source */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data (0-1) */,
  "reliability" REAL /* Reliability of the data (0-1) */,
  "consistency" REAL /* Consistency of the data (0-1) */,
  "completeness" REAL /* Completeness of the data (0-1) */,
  "timeliness" REAL /* Timeliness of the data (0-1) */,
  "relevance" REAL /* Relevance of the data (0-1) */,
  "transparency" REAL /* Transparency of the data (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, economist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category" INTEGER /* Parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_frequency" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "interval" INTEGER /* Interval of the frequency (in months) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_methodology" (
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each methodology */,
  "methodology_name" TEXT /* Name of the methodology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the methodology */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the methodology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("methodology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note or comment */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was added */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_notes_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_corrections" (
  "correction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correction */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "correction_date" TEXT /* Date when the correction was made */,
  "old_value" REAL /* Old value of the data */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value of the data */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the correction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_corrections_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data category */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data indicator */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data unit */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data frequency */,
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data methodology */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_metadata_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES data_frequency ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_metadata_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES data_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_metadata_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES data_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_metadata_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_metadata_methodology_id FOREIGN KEY ("methodology_id") REFERENCES data_methodology ("methodology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_metadata_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data used in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_data" TEXT /* Data used in the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_date" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
